payout_recommendation.rationale: Multiple high-quality tutorials published with working code; maintainer Scottcjn explicitly verified @SamHuang0927's repo and queued 50 RTC payout on 2026-04-27. Published content at nibaijing.eu.org and github.com/SamHuang0927/beacon-tutorial.

rankings.justification: Only claim thread with maintainer verification (Scottcjn comment queued 50 RTC to SamHuang0927); actual published tutorials with 500+ words and code examples substantiate the work.

payout_recommendation.rationale: 2262 comments show massive participation. @geldbert submitted 3 haikus with correct 5-7-5 syllable counts on specific hardware (ThinkPad T480, RPi 4, OptiPlex 7010). @vivekghodekar001 similarly creative. However, AI-generated content is indistinguishable and the /apply bots dilute quality.

rankings.justification: High engagement (2262 comments) with genuine creative submissions like @geldbert's 'Old ThinkPad hums soft / Hashes drift through silicon dreams / RustChain earns its sleep', but fraud risk elevated due to ease of AI generation and wallet RTC53fdf727dd3 appearing across 4+ accounts.

payout_recommendation.rationale: @yw13931835525-cyber submitted verifiable proof: Dev.to article at yw13931835525-cyber.github.io and Reddit post with links. PR #2934 provides additional documentation.

rankings.justification: Verifiable external proof links (Dev.to article + Reddit post by @yw13931835525-cyber) make claims checkable; lower comment count (29) means less noise and easier triage.

payout_recommendation.rationale: Two PRs submitted (#2963 by @yw13931835525-cyber, #2965 by @wocaoac-cpu) with sitemap.xml files. Sitemaps are trivially generated; Google Search Console verification is harder to prove without screenshots.

rankings.justification: PRs exist (#2963, #2965) but sitemap.xml is auto-generatable content; no maintainer verification yet, and Google Search Console submission cannot be independently confirmed without access logs.

payout_recommendation.rationale: 698 comments dominated by bot-generated claims. @zhuzhushiwojia posted 4+ near-identical claims all pointing to wallet RTC53fdf727dd3. @achievefibromyalgia-lgtm claims 163+ repos starred with no verifiable proof. Star/follow actions are trivially automatable with zero audit trail.

rankings.justification: Wallet RTC53fdf727dd301da40ee7974d8c04d2fb4 reused across 4+ comments by @zhuzhushiwojia (possible sybil); '163 repos starred' claims by @achievefibromyalgia-lgtm are unverifiable without API audit; 698 comments indicate severe spam/abuse.
